parameters.name: ACG-TEST — Konomi Standard Test Harness
parameters.description: Reference implementation of the Konomi Standard for UDT-nested GitHub Actions testing. Self-testing GitHub Pages site: every page has a .test.yml file and an in-browser runner verifies each step. Includes a browser terminal for ad-hoc test execution and the Paper Auto-Index Standard reference. Originally developed as github.com/teslasolar/ACG-Test; imported here as a self-contained Guild app.
